Requirements on Timing Extensions
AUTOSAR CP Release 4.4.0
Table of Contents
1 Scope of this document 6
2 Conventions Used 7
3 Use Case and Requirements Tracing 8
4 Requirements 11
4.1 Timing properties : 11
4.2 Timing constraints : 11
4.3 Optionality of timing constraints : 12
4.4 Event chains : 12
4.5 Structure of event chains : 13
4.6 Triggering behavior of event chains : 13
4.7 Synchronization of event chains : 14

4.11 Mode dependency : 16

4.19 AUTOSAR Methodology support : 19
4.20 Support for events indicating variable accesses : 20
4.21 Age constraint on assembly connector : 20
4.22 Support for Logical Execution Time : 21
4.23 Support for Specifying Synchronization : 22
5 Supported use cases 23
5.1 End-to-end timing : 23
5.1.1 Local Timing Analysis (Scheduling Analysis) : 23
5.1.2 Analysis of end-to-end timing in open loop control systems . 24
5.1.3 Analysis of end-to-end timing in closed loop control systems 24
5.1.4 Validation of end-to-end timing : 24
5.2 Synchronization : 25
5.2.1 Sensor data fusion in multi-sensor systems : 25
5.2.2 Actuator synchronization : 25
5.2.3 Bus synchronization / Gateway : 26
5.3 Early prediction : 26
5.3.1 Modification impacts due to adding a component : 26
5.3.2 Support for hardware dimensioning : 27
